title: THE ARC OF LANE COUNTY - 211info
text: ARC LANE COUNTY THE ARC OF LANE COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support and services to help people who experience intellectual and/or developmental disabilities. 4181 E Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Individuals with intellectual and/or developmental disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 343-5256 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 343-5256 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by services DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Services: Advocacy * Disabilities Issues Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - EMPLOYABILITY PROGRAM FOOD - CARES FOOD PANTRY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COMMUNITY CONNECTORS PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILIES CONNECTED/FAMILIAS EN CONEXION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - STEPPING OUT SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - ESTEAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
